what: SPECIAL-defense description bank (in-battle SPECIAL page: 威力NNN barrier/field descriptions; the NNN number is drawn by code at a fixed x). Fixed layout, in-place size-preserving edits.
note: jp reference strings in this bank are approximate: it mixes bank-local single-byte token conventions with dictionary macros the generic decoder cannot fully resolve. zh strings are byte-exact.
